<?php /** * This file is part of the Carbon package. * * (c) Brian Nesbitt <brian@nesbot.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ return array_replace_recursive(require __DIR__.'/en.php', [ 'months' => ['M01', 'M02', 'M03', 'M04', 'M05', 'M06', 'M07', 'M08', 'M09', 'M10', 'M11', 'M12'], 'months_short' => ['M01', 'M02', 'M03', 'M04', 'M05', 'M06', 'M07', 'M08', 'M09', 'M10', 'M11', 'M12'], 'first_day_of_week' => 1, 'formats' => [ 'LT' => 'HH:mm', 'LTS' => 'HH:mm:ss', 'L' => 'YYYY-MM-DD', 'LL' => 'YYYY MMM D', 'LLL' => 'YYYY MMMM D HH:mm', 'LLLL' => 'YYYY MMMM D, dddd HH:mm', ], 'year' => ':count лѣто', 'y' => ':count лѣто', 'a_year' => ':count лѣто', 'month' => ':count мѣсѧць', 'm' => ':count мѣсѧць', 'a_month' => ':count мѣсѧць', 'week' => ':count сєдмица', 'w' => ':count сєдмица', 'a_week' => ':count сєдмица', 'day' => ':count дьнь', 'd' => ':count дьнь', 'a_day' => ':count дьнь', 'hour' => ':count година', 'h' => ':count година', 'a_hour' => ':count година', 'minute' => ':count малъ', // less reliable 'min' => ':count малъ', // less reliable 'a_minute' => ':count малъ', // less reliable 'second' => ':count въторъ', 's' => ':count въторъ', 'a_second' => ':count въторъ', ]);
